description_long: This house features a modern, blocky design with multiple interconnected rectangular volumes, each topped with a flat roof. The exterior is clad in a light, brick-like material, giving it a clean and contemporary appearance. Large, flat surfaces dominate the structure, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on geometric simplicity. The front facade includes a single door and a wide window, suggesting a main entrance and living area. Windows are sparse and asymmetrically placed, contributing to the modern aesthetic. The overall structure appears to be a single-story residence with a focus on privacy and functional space.
description: A modern, single-story house with a blocky, flat-roofed design and light brick exterior. Features minimal windows and a prominent main entrance.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance with a door and a large window, highlighting the house's geometric, multi-volume layout.
description_view_1: This side view reveals the staggered arrangement of the house's volumes and the absence of windows on this facade.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a large, uninterrupted brick wall with no visible windows or doors, emphasizing privacy.
description_view_3: This angled view showcases the largest volume of the house and the flat, expansive roof surfaces.
attribute_entryway_design: Single main door with a large adjacent window, no porch or decorative elements, flush with the facade
